subject: Clerk auth migration — kicking off Jan 13

messages.subject: Clerk auth migration — kicking off Jan 13
messages.body_text:
Liam, Sofia,

Starting the Clerk migration today. Plan:

Backend (Liam — VEC-52):
- JWT middleware must accept both Firebase and Clerk tokens in parallel during transition
- Clerk tokens: RS256, JWKS at clerk.vectrix.io. Firebase: RS256 but different key structure — separate validation paths
- New Clerk org_id claim in JWT payload. Firebase tokens lack this — fallback: look up org_id from orgs table by user email
- Target: dual-token middleware live by Jan 20

Frontend (Sofia — VEC-53):
- Replace useAuth / useUser with Clerk equivalents
- useOrganization() gives us the org context we need for per-org dashboard filtering
- Background context: auth-provider-comparison.md in Drive

Customers stay on Firebase until we explicitly switch each org. Migration order: staging first, then smallest orgs, Brainloop last (non-standard token structure).

— Marcus Webb
CTO, Vectrix Labs
marcus@vectrix.io

messages.subject: Re: Clerk auth migration — kicking off Jan 13
messages.body_text:
Confirmed on the backend approach. One thing I found: Brainloop's tokens use a non-standard bearer format — missing the org claim entirely because Kevin Park's team issued them with a custom Firebase extension that predates our org model. I'll need a special case that looks up org membership by email before the standard path.

Estimate: middleware live Jan 20, Brainloop edge case resolved by Feb 7.

— Liam Nakamura
Senior Backend Engineer, Vectrix Labs
liam@vectrix.io

messages.subject: Re: Clerk auth migration — kicking off Jan 13
messages.body_text:
Starting on the frontend side. Quick question: during the transition window — when a user logs in, how do we route them to the right auth path? Is it per-org config in the DB, or do we try Clerk first and fall back to Firebase on rejection?

Also: Clerk's docs say useOrganization() can return null on first render even when authenticated. Do I need an explicit loading state for org context, or does the SDK handle it internally?

— Sofia Gutierrez
Frontend Engineer, Vectrix Labs
sofia@vectrix.io
